name: Store memory animation
description: Encoding a new concept through attention, hippocampus, and long-term association.

name: Retrieve memory animation
description: Searching and reconstructing stored knowledge back into working awareness.

name: Forgetting / weak pathway
description: A rarely activated association becomes dimmer and harder to retrieve.

name: Strengthening through repetition
description: Repeated activation brightens and thickens the memory route.
